description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a geometric, boxy design. The exterior is finished in light neutral tones, with large windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The property is surrounded by a landscaped yard featuring a mix of deciduous and coniferous trees, as well as a fenced backyard with a patio area and a small pool. The front entrance is defined by a paved walkway, flanked by shrubs and leading to a recessed doorway. The house includes multiple outdoor living spaces, such as balconies and terraces, and a garage is visible on one side. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed multi-story house with large windows, landscaped yard, and multiple outdoor living spaces. The exterior features light neutral tones and geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, and landscaped walkway with shrubs and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, garage, and dense tree coverage along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, patio, pool, and outdoor seating area with a mix of trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing terraces, balconies, and additional landscaping with a clear view of the flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some floor-to-ceiling panels
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a paved walkway, flanked by shrubs, no porch or columns, minimalistic modern style
